title: Transport bee hives by road to new apiary site
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Transport bee hives by road to new apiary site demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan road transport of hives to new apiary site

pcs.text: Identify destination and determine best route according to vehicle capability, job specifications, welfare of bees and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify destination and determine best route according to vehicle capability, job specifications, welfare of bees and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify destination and determine best route according to vehicle capability, job specifications, welfare of bees and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate travel time and estimate time of arrival.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental hazards and assess environmental risks that impact on hive health during transport.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess health and safety risks for other road users.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a hive transport plan and management strategy to address identified environmental risks to bee health and safety of people that may contact bees on route.
